name: Bienville Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook 3 bacon slices, chopped until the bacon is light brown.
2. Add 2 tablespoons butter or margarine and cook until melted.
3. Add ⅓ cup chopped green onions (with tops).
4. Stir in ¼ cup all-purpose flour.
5. Gradually add 2 cups milk, stirring constantly until smooth. Cook over low heat until the mixture thickens and bubbles.
6. Stir in 8 ounces American cheese, broken into small pieces.
7. Add ¼ cup sherry.
8. Stir in 4 ounces sliced mushrooms.
9. Add ½ pound shrimp that has been cooked and drained.
10. Stir in ¼ teaspoon Worcestershire sauce.
11. Stir in ¼ teaspoon white pepper.
12. Stir in a dash of hot pepper sauce.
